rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing Of Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 19, 2014, line 1. Hearing Of Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue DENIED. Plaintiff's application was not timely made per CCP 704.750(a). August 18, 2014 application was not presented to the Court at an ex-parte hearing and was not followed up until September 23, 2104. October 7, 2014 is outside the 20 days. = (501/RBU)
